recipe.title: Pesto
recipe.description: Learn how to make pesto with this delicious, easy pesto recipe which includes basil, pine nuts and Parmesan to give it a beautiful fresh flavour.

ingredients.name: good handful of freshly grated Parmesan cheese

steps.descr: Peel the garlic, then pound in a pestle and mortar with...
steps.instructions: Peel the garlic, then pound in a pestle and mortar with a pinch of sea salt.

on_enter.say: Peel the garlic, then pound in a pestle and mortar with a pinch of sea salt.

steps.descr: Pick, roughly chop and add the basil leaves, then bash...
steps.instructions: Pick, roughly chop and add the basil leaves, then bash to a paste (or pulse in a food processor).

on_enter.say: Pick, roughly chop and add the basil leaves, then bash to a paste (or pulse in a food processor).

steps.descr: Add the pine nuts (very lightly toast first, if you...
steps.instructions: Add the pine nuts (very lightly toast first, if you like) to the mixture and pound again, then stir in half the Parmesan.

on_enter.say: Add the pine nuts (very lightly toast first, if you like) to the mixture and pound again, then stir in half the Parmesan.

steps.descr: Drizzle in some oil – you need just enough to bind the...
steps.instructions: Drizzle in some oil – you need just enough to bind the sauce and get it to an oozy consistency.

on_enter.say: Drizzle in some oil – you need just enough to bind the sauce and get it to an oozy consistency.

steps.descr: Add most of the remaining cheese, then season to...
steps.instructions: Add most of the remaining cheese, then season to perfection with salt and black pepper. Have a taste, and keep adding a bit more cheese or oil until you are happy with the taste and consistency.

on_enter.say: Add most of the remaining cheese, then season to perfection with salt and black pepper. Have a taste, and keep adding a bit more cheese or oil until you are happy with the taste and consistency.

steps.descr: Add a squeeze of lemon juice at the end to give it a...
steps.instructions: Add a squeeze of lemon juice at the end to give it a little twang, if you like, but it’s not essential.

on_enter.say: Add a squeeze of lemon juice at the end to give it a little twang, if you like, but it’s not essential.

steps.descr: There are so many ways to serve pesto, but we love it...
steps.instructions: There are so many ways to serve pesto, but we love it with pasta, chicken, salmon or veggie tarts.

on_enter.say: There are so many ways to serve pesto, but we love it with pasta, chicken, salmon or veggie tarts.
